CustomField.description: External webhook URL for real-time push notifications. When a platform event fires (sync completion, document lifecycle), the system POSTs a JSON payload to this URL so external sites (e.g. client portal) can update without polling.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the URL of an external endpoint to receive real-time event notifications (e.g. https://yoursite.com/api/webhooks/delivery). Leave blank to disable.
CustomField.label: Webhook URL
